Motion Of Plaintiff Architectural Metal, Inc. To Enforce Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities (Motions)
Off Calendar Jun-27-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Marc Coats, Esq. (415.777.3200; mcoats@hansonbridgett.com) and David Buoncristiani, Esq. (dbuoncristiani@hansonbridgett.com) of Hanson Bridgett LLP for Plaintiff.

No other appearances.

Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ARCHITECTURAL METAL INC.'S Motion To Enforce Settlement is denied.

The at-issue settlement agreement provides for a multi-step "agreed process" that mediator Martin Triano will "supervise." The settlement also requires "a further mediation with Mr. Triano." The parties argue several points, but it is undisputed that they have not involved Triano in the "agreed process," though he is to supervise it. It would be premature for the court to purport to enforce the settlement before the parties complete the process they agreed to.

Order is signed.
